title: App Update v5.0.2 Coming Soon
subtitle: Major Fixes & Performance Improvements Comming On the Way
description: Version 5.0.2 is getting ready with comprehensive fixes for library issues, volume control, performance optimization, and more.
content: We're preparing version 5.0.2 with major improvements across the board. This update addresses critical issues reported by users and brings significant performance enhancements.

blocks.subtitle: Library Issues - Fixed
blocks.content: ✅ All library-related issues have been resolved. Your music collection will now display correctly, sync properly, and respond as expected.

blocks.subtitle: Volume Control - Fixed
blocks.content: ✅ Volume control issues are now fixed. Adjusting volume will work smoothly and consistently across all playback scenarios.

blocks.subtitle: Performance Optimization
blocks.content: ✅ Fixed blur effects causing performance degradation. The app will now run much smoother with improved rendering efficiency.

blocks.subtitle: New Blur Animation
blocks.content: 🎨 Added stunning new blur animation from vivimusic to enhance the visual experience without compromising performance.

blocks.subtitle: Player & Stability Fixes
blocks.content:
✅ Fixed network connectivity issues in the player
✅ Resolved crashes for improved app stability

The player will now handle network changes better and provide a more reliable listening experience.

blocks.subtitle: 📥 Release Coming Soon
blocks.content: Version 5.0.2 is currently in final testing and will be available for download shortly. Stay tuned for the release announcement!

blocks.subtitle: Need Help?
blocks.content: If you're experiencing any of these issues on the current version, the upcoming update will resolve them. Contact our support team if you need immediate assistance.
